ZenGoUsageAPI KeysMembersBillingSettings

Low cost coding models for everyone. Learn more.

OpenCode Go starts at $5 for your first month, then $10/month, and provides reliable access to popular open coding models with generous usage limits.

What's Included

  • Kimi K2.7 Code
  • Kimi K2.6
  • GLM-5.2
  • GLM-5.1
  • MiniMax M3
  • MiniMax M2.7
  • Qwen3.7 Max
  • Qwen3.7 Plus
  • Qwen3.6 Plus
  • DeepSeek V4 Pro
  • DeepSeek V4 Flash
  • MiMo-V2.5
  • MiMo-V2.5-Pro

The plan is designed primarily for international users, with models hosted in the US, EU, and Singapore for stable global access. Pricing and usage limits may change as we learn from early usage and feedback.
